cases.prompt: 시장조사하고 마케팅 전략 짜줘. 그로스랑 수익화도 같이 봐야 해.

assertions.text: Roughly diagnoses the user's intent before acting.
Routes to appropriate sub-skills (e.g. research/growth/monetization) as the single entry point.
Follows research→hypothesis→validate→execute and does not assert without data/evidence.

cases.prompt: /skmarket help me launch and analyze public sentiment for my app

assertions.text: Acts as the SimonKMarket orchestrator / single entry point for marketing, market-research, and sentiment work.
Interacts with the user per artifact and iterates/develops outputs.
